heading: Excise tax based on investment income of private colleges and universities
label: 4968 Excise tax based on investment income of private colleges and universities

children.heading: Tax imposed
children.label: a Tax imposed
children.text: There is hereby imposed on each applicable educational institution for the taxable year a tax equal to the applicable percentage of the net investment income of such institution for the taxable year.
1.4 percent in the case of an institution with a student adjusted endowment of at least $500,000, and not in excess of $750,000,
4 percent in the case of an institution with a student adjusted endowment in excess of $750,000, and not in excess of $2,000,000, and
8 percent in the case of an institution with a student adjusted endowment in excess of $2,000,000.
which had at least 3,000 tuition-paying students during the preceding taxable year,
more than 50 percent of the tuition-paying students of which are located in the United States,
the student adjusted endowment of which is at least $500,000, and
which is not described in the first sentence of section 511(a)(2)(B) (relating to State colleges and universities).

the aggregate fair market value of the assets of such institution (determined as of the end of the preceding taxable year), other than those assets which are used directly in carrying out the institution’s exempt purpose, divided by
the number of students of such institution.

children.heading: Determination of number of students
children.label: e Determination of number of students
children.text: For purposes of subsections (c) and (d), the number of students of an institution (including for purposes of determining the number of students at a particular location) shall be based on the daily average number of full-time students attending such institution (with part-time students taken into account on a full-time student equivalent basis).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Net investment income shall be determined under rules similar to the rules of section 4940(c).

children.heading: Student loan interest
children.label: A Student loan interest
children.text: Net investment income shall be determined by taking into account any interest income from a student loan made by the applicable educational institution (or any related organization) as gross investment income.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Net investment income shall be determined by taking into account any Federally-subsidized royalty income as gross investment income.

children.heading: In general
children.label: I In general
children.text: The term “Federally-subsidized royalty income” means any otherwise-regulatory-exempt royalty income if any Federal funds were used in the research, development, or creation of the patent, copyright, or other intellectual or intangible property from which such royalty income is derived.

children.heading: Otherwise-regulatory-exempt royalty income
children.label: II Otherwise-regulatory-exempt royalty income
children.text: For purposes of this subparagraph, the term “otherwise-regulatory-exempt royalty income” means royalty income which (but for this subparagraph) would not be taken into account as gross investment income by reason of being derived from patents, copyrights, or other intellectual or intangible property which resulted from the work of students or faculty members in their capacities as such with the applicable educational institution.

children.heading: Federal funds
children.label: III Federal funds
children.text: The term “Federal funds” includes any grant made by, and any payment made under any contract with, any Federal agency to the applicable educational institution, any related organization, or any student or faculty member referred to in subclause (II).

children.heading: Assets and net investment income of related organizations
children.label: g Assets and net investment income of related organizations
A
children.text: no such amount shall be taken into account with respect to more than 1 educational institution, and

children.label: B
children.text: unless such organization is controlled by such institution or is described in section 509(a)(3) with respect to such institution for the taxable year, assets and net investment income which are not intended or available for the use or benefit of the educational institution shall not be taken into account.

children.label: A
children.text: controls, or is controlled by, such institution,

children.label: B
children.text: is controlled by 1 or more persons which also control such institution, or

children.label: C
children.text: is a supported organization (as defined in section 509(f)(3)), or an organization described in section 509(a)(3), during the taxable year with respect to such institution.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: h Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations or other guidance as may be necessary to prevent avoidance of the tax under this section, including regulations or other guidance to prevent avoidance of such tax through the restructuring of endowment funds or other arrangements designed to reduce or eliminate the value of net investment income or assets subject to the tax imposed by this section.
